{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324015818BFB8AF89387EE2751F91"}"},"total":67},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7616016471495361305","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"数据严谨，节奏紧凑爽点十足！越来越精彩了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773244228,"group_id":"7581877572951084094","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2288557106924329"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7581877572951084094","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"398"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":50545,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":74908,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7603750959207121689","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说挺有意思，整体文风比较轻快，穿插了一些笑点。游戏中的整体数据设置还算合理，游戏里打怪升级，现实生活中和美女兄弟们组建工作室，传统网游的路子，目前看不出太多毛病，作者更快点，保持节奏就好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770388760,"group_id":"7581877572951084094","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7SuyE8egHQuaIkjsziyfWYLw4YV4G6TN1MVyv/USCi8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2288557106924329","user_name":"那加的也孙铁木儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2288557106924329","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":8,"fan_ranklist_title":"真爱粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7581877572951084094","book_info":{"abstract":"【全息网游】+【数据流】+【日常生活】+【帮会】+【国战】+【电竞】
无重生、无游戏影响现实，无游戏降临现实！
电竞新星陆川被人陷害，导致游戏关键比赛失利，赛后一系列的负面新闻爆出引发众怒。
半年后，一个神秘的快递伴随着全息网游《月灵》的开服，让陆川的生活悄然改变，凭借细腻的操作和游戏理解让他重塑往昔荣光。创建帮会，国战建功，带领俱乐部夺冠。
各路大神:“他就是《月灵大陆》唯一的传说！”
......
喜欢本书的友友麻烦加书架，欢迎大家讨论，更欢迎大家提供游戏ID，有想客串角色的宝子也请段评留言。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b4b594788b1e43c3b8c512da92c8de9a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"陈嘟嘟大锅","author_id":"","book_id":"7581877572951084094","book_name":"网游之月灵传说","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1705人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7581878159943926334","read_count":"1705","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"275051"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"128","tags":"游戏体育,网游,体育,副本,电竞","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b4b594788b1e43c3b8c512da92c8de9a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779472698&x-signature=dNHCiZYhxHDuK2SEy8vVWZKJNek%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"518571573126459","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"129"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324015818BFB8AF89387EE2751F91"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":19816,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":29393,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":440},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1770398182,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7618601008589374233","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到有点上头了，目前的比赛章节，操作描写很细腻！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773846385,"group_id":"7581877572951084094","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1021921132283952"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7581877572951084094","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"131"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读31小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":53967,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":109935,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7616024189346530073","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"网游小说就该这么写，没有重生，开局就让人笑喷了，一个神秘的快递拉开陆川的网游登顶之路，作者对主角的刻画很成功，既有小人物在资本面前的无奈，又有强烈的不甘，只能用实力去扩大影响力，想办法洗刷自身的污点，是既有谋略又杀伐果断的性格，偶尔还带点小贱。女主则是战斗狂，这点文中有体现。文中的隐藏职业目前也出来了几个，还算不错，数据也比较严谨，游戏ID很多取自诗词，很美好听。书中正反派之间的关系也错综复杂，让人感到意外，这个好评！相对游戏中的剧情，现实剧情目前更多还是偏日常，冲突不算多，看看后续能有什么发展！整体来看还算不错，可以看下去！","text_exts":[{"e":88,"s":85,"text":"影响力","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BD%B1%E5%93%8D%E5%8A%9B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774288698E2751F91%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227616024189346530073%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227581877572951084094%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BD%B1%E5%93%8D%E5%8A%9B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_typ
